dj-a11y.description: Accessibility audit: WCAG 2.1 AA — forms, icons, HTMX, Alpine, semantic HTML

dj-create-command.description: Add a management command with tests

dj-create-cron.description: Schedule a management command as a Kubernetes cron job

dj-create-crud.description: Generate full CRUD views, templates, URLs, and tests for a model

dj-create-e2e.description: Write Playwright E2E test(s) for a described user interaction

dj-create-filter.description: Add a template filter with correct escaping flags

dj-create-migration.description: Create an empty Django data migration (Python or SQL) for an app

dj-create-model.description: Design and write a Django model with factory, fixture, and model tests

dj-create-tag.description: Add a template tag (simple_tag, simple_block_tag, inclusion_tag, Node)

dj-create-task.description: Add a background task using django-tasks-db

dj-create-view.description: Add a view, template, and URL

dj-deadcode.description: Remove unused Python code, Django templates and static assets

dj-enable-db-backups.description: Enable automated daily PostgreSQL backups to a private Object Storage bucket

dj-feedback.description: File a GitHub issue against the django-studio repo

dj-full-coverage.description: Enable 100% coverage gate and write tests for all uncovered lines

dj-gdpr.description: GDPR compliance audit: PII in models, erasure, consent, logging

dj-help.description: List all slash commands or show help for a specific command

dj-launch.description: Interactive first-deploy wizard: provisions infra, configures secrets, deploys

dj-launch-observability.description: Deploy the observability stack (Grafana + Prometheus + Loki)

dj-perf.description: Performance audit: N+1 queries, missing indexes, caching, async

dj-rotate-secrets.description: Rotate auto-generated and third-party Helm secrets and redeploy

dj-secure.description: Security audit: settings, views, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, SQL injection

dj-sync.description: Pull latest template changes via Copier and resolve merge conflicts

dj-translate.description: Extract strings, translate via agent, compile .mo catalogue
